headline: Home Depot Sales Recovery And Mingledorff’s Deal Strengthen Pro Growth Story
summary: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) has recorded a sixth consecutive quarter of positive U.S. same-store sales. This performance brings its comparable sales in line with key rival Lowe's after a prior period of relative weakness. Home Depot has agreed to acquire Mingledorff’s, an HVAC distributor, expanding its reach with professional customers. For investors watching the home improvement sector, NYSE:HD sits at the center of consumer DIY demand and professional construction activity. The recent run of...
